title: Trading is Simple BUT Not Easy - The Truth
description: Why 90% of traders fail even though the concepts are simple. The psychology vs strategy debate that every trader needs to understand.
script: Trading is simple but not easy. Which matters more? Team Simple says concepts are basic. Support resistance. Supply demand zones. Team Not Easy argues psychology kills. Emotions destroy accounts daily. Both are right. Master psychology first. Follow R2F Trading for more tips.
copyText:
Trading is Simple BUT Not Easy - The Truth

Why 90% of traders fail even though the concepts are simple. The psychology vs strategy debate that every trader needs to understand.

#ICTTrading #TradingPsychology #ForexTrading #TradingMindset #DayTrading #TradingEducation #R2FTrading
